message:
chore(audit): record deep exploration batch 404 (4 files, ~14.8K lines)

http/h1/http_client.rs (3452L): SOUND — SSRF/smuggling resistant
http/h1/codec.rs (1547L): SOUND — request smuggling protections
database/postgres.rs (5518L): SOUND — SCRAM-SHA-256 correct
sync/pool.rs (4280L): SOUND — cancel-safe baton passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
